paper_metadata.title: Big Bird: Transformers for Longer Sequences
paper_metadata.abstract: Transformers-based models, such as BERT, have been one of the most successful deep learning models for NLP. Unfortunately, one of their core limitations is the quadratic dependency (mainly in terms of memory) on the sequence length due to their full attention mechanism. To remedy this, we propose, BigBird, a sparse attention mechanism that reduces this quadratic dependency to linear. We show that BigBird is a universal approximator of sequence functions and is Turing complete, thereby preserving these properties of the quadratic, full attention model. Along the way, our theoretical analysis reveals some of the benefits of having $O(1)$ global tokens (such as CLS), that attend to the entire sequence as part of the sparse attention mechanism. The proposed sparse attention can handle sequences of length up to 8x of what was previously possible using similar hardware. As a consequence of the capability to handle longer context, BigBird drastically improves performance on various NLP tasks such as question answering and summarization. We also propose novel applications to genomics data.

extraction_data.innovation: BIGBIRD introduces a sparse attention mechanism that reduces the quadratic dependency on sequence length to linear, enabling the model to handle sequences up to 8x longer than previous models while preserving theoretical properties like universal approximation and Turing completeness. The mechanism combines global tokens, local neighboring tokens, and random tokens for attention.
extraction_data.pretraining_corpus: BooksCorpus, English Wikipedia, and other large-scale text corpora (exact corpus not fully specified)
extraction_data.finetuning_task: Binary classification (Promoter Region Prediction), Multi-task binary classification (Chromatin-Profile Prediction)
extraction_data.extension: The sparse attention mechanism consists of global tokens attending to the entire sequence, local windowed attention, and random attention, which together enable efficient handling of longer sequences compared to full attention models.
extraction_data.research_problem: Handling longer sequences in Transformer-based models with reduced computational and memory requirements
extraction_data.application: Question answering, document summarization, genomics sequence modeling (e.g., DNA representation, promoter-region and chromatin profile prediction)
extraction_data.paper_title: Big Bird: Transformers for Longer Sequences

extraction_data.innovation: BigBird introduces a sparse attention mechanism combining random attention, sliding window attention, and global attention (internal transformer construction, ITC) to reduce quadratic complexity while maintaining expressiveness for longer sequences.
extraction_data.pretraining_corpus: Long-sequence datasets (e.g., Books, ArXiv, PubMed, Natural Questions)
extraction_data.application: Long-sequence natural language processing, computational biology
extraction_data.research_problem: Reducing quadratic complexity of self-attention in Transformers for longer sequences
extraction_data.extension: Sparse attention mechanism with random, sliding window, and global tokens (internal transformer construction) to approximate full attention with linear complexity.
extraction_data.paper_title: Big Bird: Transformers for Longer Sequences

extraction_data.innovation: BigBird introduces a sparse attention mechanism combining random attention, sliding window attention, and global attention (extended transformer construction, ETC) by adding extra global tokens to improve performance on long-sequence tasks.
extraction_data.pretraining_corpus: Long-sequence datasets (e.g., Books, ArXiv, PubMed, Natural Questions)
extraction_data.application: Long-sequence natural language processing, computational biology
extraction_data.research_problem: Reducing quadratic complexity of self-attention in Transformers for longer sequences
extraction_data.extension: Sparse attention mechanism with random, sliding window, and additional global tokens (extended transformer construction) to store context and improve performance.
extraction_data.paper_title: Big Bird: Transformers for Longer Sequences

extraction_data.innovation: Introduces a sparse attention mechanism that reduces quadratic complexity to linear for longer sequences, enabling efficient processing of long documents while maintaining performance on downstream tasks.
extraction_data.application: Question answering, document classification, text summarization
extraction_data.research_problem: Handling longer sequences in Transformer models with reduced computational complexity
extraction_data.extension: Sparse attention mechanism with random, local, and global attention patterns to handle longer sequences efficiently.
extraction_data.paper_title: Big Bird: Transformers for Longer Sequences

extraction_data.innovation: Large-sized variant of BIGBIRD-ETC, trained for improved performance on long-sequence tasks, achieving state-of-the-art results on Natural Questions, TriviaQA, and WikiHop.
extraction_data.application: Question answering, document classification, text summarization
extraction_data.research_problem: Handling longer sequences in Transformer models with reduced computational complexity
extraction_data.extension: Expanded global tokens in the sparse attention mechanism to enhance model performance on tasks requiring long-range dependencies.
extraction_data.paper_title: Big Bird: Transformers for Longer Sequences

extraction_data.innovation: Encoder-decoder variant of BIGBIRD using Pegasus initialization for state-of-the-art abstractive summarization on long documents, achieving significant improvements on Arxiv, PubMed, and BigPatent datasets.
extraction_data.pretraining_corpus: BooksCorpus, English Wikipedia, CC-News, Stories, C4, HugeNews
extraction_data.research_problem: Abstractive summarization of long documents using efficient attention mechanisms
extraction_data.pretraining_task: Masked Language Modeling (MLM) with summarization-specific pretraining
extraction_data.extension: Sparse attention mechanism applied to the encoder in an encoder-decoder setup, combined with Pegasus pretraining for summarization tasks.
extraction_data.paper_title: Big Bird: Transformers for Longer Sequences

extraction_data.innovation: BigBird introduces a sparse attention mechanism that reduces the quadratic dependency on sequence length to linear, enabling longer-context modeling. It uses a combination of random, local, and global attention patterns to preserve the expressive power of full attention while improving efficiency.
extraction_data.pretraining_corpus: General-purpose MLM pretraining corpus (unspecified), BooksCorpus, English Wikipedia
extraction_data.application: Long-document summarization, question answering, document classification, genomics tasks (e.g., promoter region prediction, chromatin-profile prediction)
extraction_data.research_problem: Handling longer sequences in Transformer models efficiently without losing expressive power
extraction_data.finetuning_task: Task-specific fine-tuning (e.g., summarization, question answering, document classification, genomics tasks)
extraction_data.extension: Sparse attention mechanism combining random, local, and global attention patterns to handle longer sequences efficiently.
extraction_data.paper_title: Big Bird: Transformers for Longer Sequences

extraction_data.innovation: BigBird leverages summarization-specific pretraining from Pegasus for large-sized models, enabling state-of-the-art performance on abstractive summarization tasks by modeling longer context.
extraction_data.pretraining_corpus: Summarization-specific pretraining corpus (Pegasus), large-scale text corpus
extraction_data.research_problem: Improving abstractive summarization and long-document understanding
extraction_data.extension: Warm-started from Pegasus pretraining for summarization tasks, combined with sparse attention for longer sequences.
extraction_data.paper_title: Big Bird: Transformers for Longer Sequences

extraction_data.innovation: Sparse attention mechanism (BIGBIRD) applied to encoder-decoder architectures for long-sequence summarization, warm-started with Pegasus pretrained weights for improved performance.
extraction_data.pretraining_corpus: Large-scale text corpus (unspecified), human reference GRCh37 (genomic data)
extraction_data.application: Long-document summarization, genomic sequence modeling, natural language generation
extraction_data.research_problem: Handling longer sequences in Transformer models efficiently without performance degradation
extraction_data.pretraining_task: Masked Language Model (MLM), sequence-to-sequence summarization objective
extraction_data.extension: Block sparse attention with global tokens, random tokens, and sliding window tokens in encoder; full attention retained in decoder for shorter output sequences.
extraction_data.paper_title: Big Bird: Transformers for Longer Sequences
